title: Faithful 64x for AppleSkin
description: Adds Stylized AppleSkin texture for Faithful 64x | Works on all Game Versions!
body:
# Preview
![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/kztZrpEN/images/d6b9df886369f8ebb4b0538a861f6f47799c0679.png)

This ResourcePack modifies the AppleSkin texture making it more suitable for Faithful 64x

(Everything is visible above)

# Load Order
![Load Order](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/kztZrpEN/images/c3b37041bee6c1b3601a3cb71d85df977af9086a.png)

This is not Necessary, but it is Desirable.
